message:
feat(runtime): add TaskTable for hot-path task isolation (bd-2018r)

Introduce TaskTable struct encapsulating task arena and stored futures
to enable finer-grained locking in future sharding work.

TaskTable provides focused APIs:
- task()/task_mut() - record access
- insert_task()/remove_task() - arena operations
- get_stored_future()/remove_stored_future()/store_spawned_task()
- tasks_arena()/tasks_arena_mut() - direct arena access for intrusive ops

This is phase 1 of the sharding refactor. Full integration with
RuntimeState (having it delegate to TaskTable) is a separate change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
